nasb.text: And Jesus said to them, “Watch out and beware of the leaven of the Pharisees and Sadducees.”

esv.text: Jesus said to them, “Watch and beware of the leaven of the Pharisees and Sadducees.”

cnv.text: 耶穌對他們說：“你們要小心，提防法利賽人和撒都該人的酵。”

ccb.text: 耶稣对他们说：“你们要小心提防法利赛人和撒都该人的酵。”

csbs.text: 耶稣对他们说：“你们要注意，要提防法利赛人和撒都该人的酵母。”
